transcription.text: With the help of Subway's low-fat sandwiches and exercise, summer's looking good for a lot of people. Feeling good, having fun in the sun. Subway's taste is number one. Look at us now, we're living right. And we owe it to the man who showed us the light. And how's Jared these days? He's looking better than ever. Subway has seven delicious fresh-made sandwiches with just six grams of fat or less and a lot of other smart ideas. Come to Subway and take a bite. Subway. Eat fresh.

Come to Subway and take a bite.
